channel.title: Flutter on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Flutter on Arrans github.io

item.title: dart_unix_single_instance
item.description: A library which uses unix sockets to ensure a single instance

item.title: window_manager
item.description: This plugin allows Flutter desktop apps to resizing and repositioning the window.

item.title: system_windows
item.description: Get opened windows and check which one of them is currently focused

item.title: isar
item.description: Extremely fast, easy to use, and fully async NoSQL database for Flutter

item.title: mangayomi
item.description: Free and open source application for reading manga and watching anime available on Android, iOS, macOS, Linux and Windows

item.title: flutter_google_datastore
item.description: Google Datastore and Datastore emulator client for “easy” modification of values

item.title: lemmy_notify
item.description: Lemmy Notification app - for desktop atm
